ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Date, flesh and skin, pitted, dried
Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt
Cherry, flesh and skin, pitted, raw

ingredients_text: 37 % Datteln, 20 % Rosinen (Rosinen, Sonnenblumenöl), 20% Mandeln, 12% Cashewkerne, 5% Kirschen, 3% Cranberrys (Cranberrys, Apfelsaftkonzentrat, Sonnenblumeni), 2.5% Maulbeeren, 0,5 % Vanillepulver
